chinese_news.title: 氪星晚报｜马斯克旗下SpaceX启动史上最大规模IPO计划；全国首张综合性司机服务地图上线；海关总署在粤发布《海关支持粤港澳大湾区建设若干措施》
chinese_news.summary:
大公司：

SpaceX据悉计划五年内实现每年1万次发射

据美国联邦航空管理局（FAA）局长周三透露，SpaceX正抛出一个宏大的计划，即在五年内实现每年10000次发射。但该机构对此表示，在批准此类扩张计划之前，政府官员需要看到其可靠性有所提升。今年1月，SpaceX公司还曾表示，其计划发射并组建一个由100万个卫星组成的星座，这些卫星将环绕地球运行，并利用太阳为人工智能数据中心供电。（财联社）

阿里股东信释放信号，即时零售已成为淘宝天猫核心战略支

chinese_news.title: 新石器NewClaw：AI一体化解决方案，零门槛当无人车指挥官| 2026AI Partner·北京亦庄AI+产业大会
chinese_news.summary:
管理一千台无人车需要多少人？答案是：一个人，一部手机，一句话。当自动驾驶逐渐“平权”，真正的瓶颈从技术转向了规模化运营。

新石器用七年时间走完从合规落地、规模量产到万台运营的三级跳，如今推出AI Agent“Neo Claw”——让用户像聊天一样指挥车队，把单人管理效率从10台拉升到100台以上。颉晶华强调，AI的价值不在于写多少代码，而在于解放双手——让无人车管理从“专业操作”变成“说话就行”。

以下为演讲内容，经36氪整理编辑：

<

chinese_news.title: 业绩快报 | 唯品会一季度净营收266亿元，SVIP用户贡献超50%线上销售额
chinese_news.summary:
5月21日美股盘前，唯品会发布2025年第一季度财报。一季度内，唯品会实现净营收266亿元（人民币，下同），Non-GAAP净利润23亿元。

观察核心运营数据，一季度其实现商品交易总额（GMV）569亿元，同比增长8.6%，订单量1.73亿单，同比增长3.2%。同时，平台于该季度活跃用户数为4170万，同比实现正增长。

在春节期间穿戴和年货需求集中释放、透支后续消费力的季节性特点下，相较于行业整体节奏，唯品会在交易规模与订单量增速上保持韧性，体现出其在货品供给、用户运营上的核心竞争力。

在货品供给端，一季度唯品会持续挖掘重点客群消费特点并扩充优质供给。“限时狂秒”栏目引入雅诗兰黛、珀莱雅等品牌的明星单品，有效激发用户购买意愿，推动栏目业绩实现同比显著增长，并带动用户回访率提升。

同时，平台结合专业运动、休闲健身、户外踏青等多元场景，与萨洛蒙、安踏、李宁、伯希和、凯乐石等知名品牌深化合作，充分对标时下消费者日益增长的户外运动需求。

顺应一季度踏青时节与清明小长假等带动的户外休闲消费热潮，今年3

chinese_news.title: 从概念到产线一：AI在工业制造领域的深水区探索| 2026AI Partner·北京亦庄AI+产业大会
chinese_news.summary:
AI在工业制造领域，不是“锦上添花”的辅助工具，而是“重新设计工厂”的核心引擎。从AOI报废板的秒级识别，到刀具参数的动态优化，再到打通设计、生产、供应链的全链路智能——这场对话告诉我们，每1%的效率提升都是真金白银，AI的价值不是叠加功能，而是把“人等货”变成“货等人”。

演讲拆解了AI从概念到产线的落地路径：用自动化中台打通全链路协同，让AI在研发设计、工程预测、供应链管理、生产执行四个领域实现可量化的提效。针对不同制造业企业，给出分层方案。AI不是在某个环节帮你做得更好，而是从原生流程开始，重新定义制造业的生产力基准。

以下为嘉立创云ERP负责人 杨超 演讲内容，经36氪整理编辑：

chinese_news.title: 城市级AI服务：从试点到常态化，机器人的实景作战与规模化落地| 2026AI Partner·北京亦庄AI+产业大会
chinese_news.summary:
当Robotaxi还在为L4苦苦挣扎时，酷哇的环卫机器人、无人小巴、机器狗已经在50多个城市“上岗”赚钱了。

具身智能最大的瓶颈不是算法，而是数据——没有量产就没有数据，没有数据就无法进化。酷哇的解法是“以战养战”：让机器人在真实运营中一边干活一边成长，用万台规模反哺模型迭代。李柯宏强调，中国是全球少有的支持机器人规模化应用的市场，酷哇正依托“一带一路”先行布点，用真实的运营数据驱动具身智能的持续进化。

以下为酷哇科技联合创始人、COO 李柯宏 演讲内容，经36氪整理编辑：

chinese_news.title: 36氪x PureblueAI清蓝战略合作启动仪式暨《2026消费品牌AI推荐力名册》发布 | 2026 AI Partner·北京亦庄AI+产业大会
chinese_news.summary: 5月19日，2026北京亦庄AI+产业大会上，36氪与PureblueAI清蓝正式达成战略合作，并联合发布《2026消费品牌AI推荐力名册》。随着AI逐渐成为新的信息入口和消费决策入口，品牌在AI回答中是否被提及、是否被推荐、排序是否靠前，正在成为新的竞争维度。36氪副总裁迟涵表示，36氪是最早发现和报道GEO的媒体，PureblueAI清蓝在自研技术算法和“科学GEO”方法论上的积累令其成为可信的合作伙伴。PureblueAI清蓝市场副总裁李铭则用“最敏锐的商业洞察和最硬核的AI营销技术的融合”来形容此次合作，并透露该名册将分期、分行业持续发布，为品牌在AI时代提供“AI语境下的体检报告和风向标”。

chinese_news.title: 把确定性，写进农业：四个外行、两次失败、三千万学费换来的答案| 2026AI Partner·北京亦庄AI+产业大会
chinese_news.summary:
两次失败、三千万学费——创业没有爽剧剧本，这是陆渔科技深耕农业AI真实的“入场券”。当99%的人还在用AI写文案、做设计时，有人把它扔进了鱼塘，只为解决一个最朴素的问题：不确定性。

鲁敏用18年IT男转型“新农民”的经历，揭开了水产养殖最残酷的真相：1.38万亿的市场，数字化渗透率不足5%，一叶方塘，百万归零。这场分享没有宏大叙事，只有从黑箱到白盒、从赌运气到算数据的血泪教训：农业要的不是快，是确定性。

以下为陆渔科技联合创始人、首席技术官 鲁敏 演讲内容，经36氪整理编辑：

chinese_news.title: 从算力到价值：AI时代的基础设施重构与产业增长新引擎| 2026AI Partner·北京亦庄AI+产业大会
chinese_news.summary:
token经济如何重塑AI产业链？从芯片到智算中心，从模型服务到终端应用，token正在成为贯穿全链的计价单位。而当推理算力需求超越训练，智算中心的角色正从算力仓库变为token工厂，一个万亿级市场的大门刚刚打开。

token正在成为AI时代的新质生产力单位。宋琛指出，随着Agent成为新交互入口，单次任务token消耗已从几千飙升至百万级别，而中国token调用量已占全球61%。在这一趋势下，AI基础设施的竞争焦点正在从“谁的模型参数更大”转向“谁能以更低成本支撑海量token流转”。英博数科的定位正是“token工厂”的全栈构建者——不做模型，不卖应用，而是提供从规划设计到软硬一体交付的智算中心一站式解决方案。

以下为演讲内容全文，经36氪整理编辑：

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will SpaceX complete its IPO and list on Nasdaq before 2026-12-31?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: SpaceX released IPO prospectus on 2026-05-05; Starship test flight 12 imminent; prospectus signals record offering likely in H2 2026.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC: SpaceX readies 12th test flight; IPO prospectus released; 36Kr reports SpaceX five-year plan targets 10k annual launches post-IPO.

prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Long-term holder supply exceeds 15M BTC; CoinDesk analysis suggests new lows 'extremely slim'; Mark Cuban's ETH liquidation and macro uncertainty create volatility around conviction.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk: Long-term holders' supply tops 15M; Mark Cuban BTC/ETH reallocation; Cointelegraph: Harvard dumps entire ETH position.

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Anthropic secure a major chip supply deal with Microsoft before 2026-09-30?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: CNBC reports active deal talks post-$5B investment; Microsoft Maia 200 chips prove efficient but unavailable to customers; Broadcom/Meta UCLA hub signals sector consolidation.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC: Anthropic-Microsoft talks on AI chip deal; Meta/Broadcom $125M semiconductor hub at UCLA.

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will the Trump administration issue a revised AI executive order by 2026-08-31?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Trump postponed signing on 2026-05-05, citing discomfort with 'blocker' language; stated AI is 'causing tremendous good'; suggests revised order likely.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC: Trump postpones AI executive order, says he will revise aspects.

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Workday (WDAY) stock outperform SPY by >10% through 2026-12-31?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: WDAY jumped 14% on 2026-05-05 following CEO guidance on AI-driven margin expansion; market repricing AI software competency.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC: Workday jumps 14% on margin forecast bump; AI strength cited.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will the CFTC or DOJ attempt to ban or severely restrict crypto prediction markets (Polymarket, Kalshi, Manifold) before 2026-12-31?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Federal Register; CFTC enforcement announcements; DOJ press releases.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: CoinDesk reports Congress wants to ban crypto prediction markets citing 'national security risks' but no market yet prices legislative/enforcement timeline; CFTC-NHL MOU signals regulatory intent.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk: 'Crypto prediction markets turning into dangerous national security risks'; CFTC securing NHL safeguard deal indicates regulatory tightening.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Tesla (TSLA) close above $280 on 2026-12-31?
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: No major Tesla-specific catalyst in news today, but SpaceX IPO buzz and Elon-Trump alignment could amplify Tesla valuation; macro AI/tech sector strength underappreciated.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: SpaceX IPO prospectus signals Elon execution confidence; Trump AI order deferral removes regulatory overhang; Binance SpaceX perps launch shows retail appetite for Elon-backed assets.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Ethereum/Bitcoin ratio fall below 0.035 by 2026-12-31?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: CoinGecko or Kraken ETH/BTC pair daily close.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Harvard dumps entire ETH position; Cointelegraph reports 'Ethereum identity crisis' and 'brain drain'; BTC long-term holder conviction rising (15M+ supply) while ETH conviction crumbles.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Cointelegraph: Harvard liquidated full ETH stake after one quarter; Ethereum 'brain drain' frustration cited; CoinDesk: Mark Cuban sold most BTC but tone suggests ETH skepticism higher.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will U.S. core inflation (ex-food, energy) fall below 2.5% annualized in Q3 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Bureau of Labor Statistics PCE or CPI release.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Trump EPA refrigerant rule delay marketed as grocery-cost relief; unclear impact but signals inflation messaging pivot; crypto/macro traders underweight near-term disinflation risk.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Trump EPA rule postponement indicates administration prioritizing inflation optics; gasoline/commodity volatility (Iran Hormuz claim) adds noise but near-term labor data divergence likely.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will a generalist AI model from Anthropic, OpenAI, or Google achieve >80% accuracy on a live, unpublished 2026 STEM competition (e.g., IOI, IMO, F=ma) by 2026-10-31?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Published competition results; official leaderboards or press releases from competition organizers.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Anthropic-Microsoft chip deal and Workday AI margin gains suggest AGI capability bars rising; no active prediction market hedges near-term AI capability jumps.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Anthropic securing sustained chip supply + Microsoft partnership signals training/inference momentum; Workday CEO AI success language implies agentic capability expansion.

investment_theses.thesis: Long BTC/USD, short Ethereum spot or ratio (BTC/ETH); Ethereum fundamentals diverging from BTC as institutional conviction shifts and regulatory scrutiny widens stablecoin/DeFi channels.
supporting_signals: Harvard Management dumps entire ETH position after one quarter; Cointelegraph: 'Ethereum identity crisis' and 'brain drain' frustrate community.
CoinDesk: Cointelegraph long-term BTC holder supply exceeds 15M; new lows 'extremely slim.'
Mark Cuban liquidates BTC but tone suggests deeper ETH skepticism; crypto PAC endorsements for 2026 midterms skew Bitcoin narrative.
investment_theses.counter_view: Ethereum Shanghai/Dencun upgrades and staking yield (6-8% APY) offer superior risk-adjusted returns; ETH correlation to BTC overstated; Solana/Base L2 narrative transfer temporary.
investment_theses.expression: Long BTC perpetuals (Bybit, Deribit; 2-3x leverage); short ETH spot via Kraken or short ETH perps vs. long BTC perps (BTC/ETH ratio trade).

investment_theses.thesis: Overweight semiconductor/AI infrastructure plays (NVDA, ASML, MU) into H2 2026 as SpaceX IPO and Anthropic-Microsoft chip deal signal sustained capex cycle; underweight consumer discretionary (TSLA, AMZN) on margin compression.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Anthropic-Microsoft AI chip deal talks; Meta/Broadcom $125M UCLA semiconductor hub launched.
36Kr: Token economics reshaping AI supply chain; smart compute center capex inflecting higher as inference demand grows.
Workday +14% on AI margin guidance; enterprise AI capex acceleration evident across software/cloud peers.
investment_theses.counter_view: Chip cycle maturity and inventory glut risk; ASML guidance may disappoint; geopolitical Taiwan/China risk repricing; crypto crash crushes data center utilization.
investment_theses.expression: Long NVDA, ASML, or INTC calls (3-6m); overweight SMH (iShares Semiconductor ETF) vs. SPY; short TSLA or Tesla ratio to SPY.

investment_theses.thesis: Short U.S. dollar index (DXY) into summer 2026 as Trump administration delays disinflationary policy (EPA rules) and international tensions (Iran Hormuz claims, Cuba rhetoric) push safe-haven flows toward carry trades and risk assets; DXY 102-103 ceiling.
supporting_signals: Trump EPA rule delay signals inflation-tolerance pivot; 'save you money at grocery' messaging contradicts Fed disinflationary guidance.
BBC/Reuters: Iran escalates Hormuz claims; Cuba-U.S. tensions rise (Rubio). Geopolitical tail risk priced but dollar safe-haven flows reversing.
CoinDesk/Cointelegraph: Crypto prediction markets heating up; institutional options flow suggests downside demand for USD strength fading.
investment_theses.counter_view: Fed hold/hike cycle unwind slower than priced; Treasury yields re-test 5%; geopolitical shock (Iran/Taiwan) forces dollar bid; FOMC dots remain hawkish.
investment_theses.expression: Short DXY perps on CME or short USD/JPY, EUR/USD long (3:1 ratio); long gold or GLD etf as hedge.

investment_theses.thesis: Long Bitcoin volatility (VIX-equivalent, e.g., CVIX or BTC option straddles, 30-60 DTE) as prediction market regulatory crackdown risk (Congress ban threat) and Ethereum capitulation create vol expansion; short BTC spot implied vol premium.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: Congress advancing crypto prediction market ban; CFTC-NHL MOU signals enforcement escalation.
Harvard Ethereum liquidation + Cointelegraph 'brain drain' trigger cascading ETH reallocation flows.
SpaceX IPO roadshow (H2 2026) and Trump AI order deferral create binary event windows.
investment_theses.counter_view: Regulatory uncertainty already priced into options; crypto premium vol too high; prediction markets small percentage of crypto AUM; no selloff catalyst imminent.
investment_theses.expression: Long 60-day ATM straddles on BTC futures (CME); long vol via short delta-hedged call spreads; or buy volatility via Deribit/Bybit options.

investment_theses.thesis: Overweight autonomous mobility and robotics tokens/stocks (NEAR, emerging China robotics plays via 36Kr coverage of Kuwa, Newstone NewClaw) as Chinese AI + robotics deployment accelerates; U.S. Robotaxi (TSLA FSD, Waymo) narrative overhyped relative to deployed unit volume and revenue.
supporting_signals: 36Kr: Kuwa robots deployed in 50+ Chinese cities, already monetizing (environmental sanitation contracts); Newstone NewClaw AI agent manages 100+ robots per operator vs. U.S. L4 stalemate.
Token economy reshaping AI supply chain (36Kr): embodied AI data loops reward deployed scale, not model hype.
NEAR trending on crypto exchanges; Chinese AI robotics startups attracting VC attention.
investment_theses.counter_view: Chinese regulatory crackdowns on autonomous vehicles and robotics; NEAR protocol adoption lagging Solana/Ethereum; Western robotics sentiment still negative on TSLA Optimus delays.
investment_theses.expression: Long NEAR spot or perps; monitor 36Kr for Chinese robotics IPO plays (e.g., Kuwa, Newstone) for U.S. listing or ADR proxies; short TSLA Robotaxi overvaluation via put spreads.
